title: leontodon hispidus var. alpicola
intro: Leontodon hispidus var. alpicola, also known as Alpine Hawkbit, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Alpine Hawkbit include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and astringent, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and protect against infections. Alpine Hawkbit can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for internal use, or as a poultice for topical applications.
